title: SpaceInvite/get: no membership filter — any user can enumerate all invite codes
description: get_space_invites() called by SpaceInvite/get JMAP handler does not filter by caller's space membership. With ids=null it returns every space_invite row in the DB including invites for spaces the caller does not belong to. Any authenticated user can enumerate all invite codes for all spaces. Invite codes have ~40 bits of entropy (8 Crockford Base32 chars), insufficient as an access control secret if enumerable. Fix: filter get_space_invites to return only invites for spaces where account_id is a member (JOIN to space_member), mirroring how get_spaces is filtered.
